# CSP — after R-CSP (worktree-agent-a13e2c17, apps/web/middleware.ts buildCsp)
#
# `{NONCE}` is a per-request UUID v4 generated by middleware via
# `crypto.randomUUID()` and forwarded to RSC + route handlers via the
# `x-nonce` request header.
#
# Production:

default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'nonce-{NONCE}' 'strict-dynamic'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; connect-src 'self'; worker-src 'self' blob:; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'

# Development (HMR uses eval()):

default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'nonce-{NONCE}' 'strict-dynamic' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; connect-src 'self'; worker-src 'self' blob:; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'

# Diff vs before:
#   - script-src: removed 'unsafe-inline'; added 'nonce-{NONCE}' + 'strict-dynamic'
#                 (production also drops 'unsafe-eval')
#   - font-src:  added https://cdn.jsdelivr.net (prevents Pretendard variable
#                font fetches from being silently denied; previously the
#                stylesheet rule loaded but the .woff2 fetches it issued
#                were not explicitly allowed)
#   - all other directives unchanged
#
# Verified live (dev curl):
#   - GET /        -> CSP nonce in header == nonce on every <script> in body
#                     (Next.js own chunks AND next-themes inline bootstrap)
#   - GET /api/docs -> CSP nonce in header == nonce on inline <style>+<script>x2
#   - 'unsafe-inline' fully absent from script-src in both prod and dev branches
